sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21124" key="bru/tinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρῡ´τ-ινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n21124.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βρῦτον</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:96" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">96</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παρὰ προσδοκίαν</foreign> for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βύσσινος</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
